generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former FEMA director, I've seen firsthand how vital civil defense preparedness is for national security. The current administration's cuts to local emergency response budgets put us all at risk. We can't afford to wait until disaster strikes—we need robust funding for community resilience programs now. #CivilDefenseMatters #NationalSecurityFirst
